scenario.name: Basic Register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[field1];lr> Record-Route: <sip:[field1];lr> From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Max-Forwards: 70 P-Visited-Network-ID: ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 18000 Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[field0]@[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport Route: <sip:mo@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr>, <sip:mo@127.0.0.1:6060;lr> Record-Route: <sip:mo@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr>, <sip:mo@[local_ip]:[local_port];lr> From: <sip:[field9]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field9]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>" Require: sec-agree Proxy-Require: sec-agree Supported: path,sec-agree Event: reg Accept: application/reginfo+xml P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=4600100015EE0000 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Expires: 1800 Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[field1];lr> From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$cseq_value_str] REGISTER P-Visited-Network-ID: ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 18000 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[field1];lr> From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER P-Visited-Network-ID: ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 0 Content-Length: 0
